description: The cursor lingers over the 'Save & Exit' button in the bottom left corner of the sidebar.
frame_description: The user is viewing the main Studies dashboard with a list of active and unmoderated studies.

description: The user clicks on 'Project delivery' in the left-hand navigation menu.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the sidebar and selects the Project delivery menu item.

description: The sidebar menu expands to reveal sub-options for project types.
frame_description: The sidebar now shows 'Interview study', 'Unmoderated study', 'Participant recruitment', and 'Project delivery' as sub-items.

description: The cursor hovers over the 'Interview study' option in the expanded sidebar menu.
frame_description: The user pauses briefly over the Interview study option before clicking.

description: The user clicks on 'Interview study' to begin creating a new study.
frame_description: The user selects the Interview study option from the sidebar.

description: The application navigates to the Study Setup page for a new remote call study.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the dashboard to the first step of the study creation wizard.

description: The user clicks into the 'Study title' input field and clears the existing placeholder text.
frame_description: The input field is focused and the default title is removed.

description: A red 'Required' validation message appears below the empty study title field.
frame_description: The UI indicates that the study title is a mandatory field after the user cleared it.

description: The user types 'TV Streaming - Discovery' into the study title field.
frame_description: The new title is entered character by character into the text box.

description: The cursor hovers over the 'Next' button after the title has been entered.
frame_description: The user prepares to proceed to the next step of the setup.

description: The user clicks the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The Next button is activated to save the title and move forward.

description: The application navigates to the 'Research method' step of the study setup.
frame_description: The page content updates to show options for 'Video Call', 'In-person', 'Online Task', etc.

description: A loading spinner appears as the application prepares the research method selection page.
frame_description: A white loading screen with a central spinner is visible during the page transition.

description: User hovers over the "In-person" research method card.
frame_description: The cursor moves to explore the In-person research method option.

description: User clicks the "Next" button to proceed to device requirements.
frame_description: The user confirms their research method selection by clicking Next.

description: A loading animation and screen transition occur.
frame_description: The screen slides to the right as the next step loads.

description: The application navigates to the device requirements page.
frame_description: The 'Device requirements' page is displayed, asking which devices participants should use.

description: User hovers over the "Any device" radio option.
frame_description: The cursor stays over the default 'Any device' selection.

description: User hovers over the "Next" button on the device requirements page.
frame_description: The cursor dwells on the Next button before the user clicks.

description: User clicks the "Next" button to proceed to tool selection.
frame_description: The user confirms the device requirements.

description: Loading state during transition to tool selection.
frame_description: The screen transitions to the next setup step.

description: The application navigates to the tool selection page.
frame_description: The 'Which tool will you use to conduct the remote research?' page is shown.

description: User hovers over the "askable" tool card.
frame_description: The cursor dwells on the recommended Askable tool option.

description: User clicks the "Next" button to proceed to the quota page.
frame_description: The user selects the tool and moves to the next step.

description: Loading state during transition to the quota page.
frame_description: The application loads the participant quota configuration.

description: The application navigates to the quota page.
frame_description: The 'Quota' page appears, showing a default participant count of 12.

description: User hovers over the participant quota input field.
frame_description: The cursor stays over the input field containing the value '12'.

description: User clicks the "I want to use a third party tool" link.
interaction_target: I want to use a third party tool link
frame_description: The user interacts with the link to expand third-party tool options.

description: The UI expands to show a list of third-party tool options like Zoom and Lookback.
frame_description: A section titled 'Third party software' appears with various tool logos.

description: User hovers over the "Next" button on the quota page.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the Next button after viewing the tool options.

description: User clicks the "Next" button.
frame_description: The user clicks Next, but the page appears to refresh or stay on the quota step.

description: Loading state and sliding animation as the quota page refreshes.
frame_description: The screen transitions, but remains on the Quota configuration.

description: The application remains on or re-navigates to the quota page.
frame_description: The Quota page is visible again, with the third-party tool section now hidden.

description: User hovers over the quota input field again.
frame_description: The cursor dwells on the input field, suggesting the user intends to change the value.

description: User clicks into the quota input field to edit the value.
frame_description: The input field is focused for text entry.

description: User types "5" into the quota input field, changing it from "12".
frame_description: The value in the input field is updated to 5.

description: User hovers over the "Next" button after updating the quota.
frame_description: The cursor dwells on the Next button for several seconds.

description: User clicks the "Next" button to proceed to session format.
frame_description: The user confirms the updated quota.

description: Loading state during transition to session format.
frame_description: The application transitions to the next setup step.

description: The application navigates to the session format page.
frame_description: The 'Session format' page is displayed, offering Individual Interviews or Focus Groups.

description: User hovers over the "Individual Interviews" session format card.
frame_description: The cursor dwells on the Individual Interviews option.

description: User clicks the "Next" button to proceed to session duration.
frame_description: The user confirms the session format.

description: Loading state and sliding animation during transition.
frame_description: The screen transitions to the next step.

description: The application navigates to the session duration page.
frame_description: The 'Session duration' page is shown, with a default of 45 mins.

description: User hovers over the "Next" button on the session duration page.
frame_description: The cursor dwells on the Next button.

description: User clicks the "Next" button to proceed to participant selection.
frame_description: The user confirms the session duration.

description: Loading state and sliding animation during transition.
frame_description: The screen transitions to the final step in this segment.

description: The application navigates to the participant selection page.
frame_description: The 'Participant selection' page is displayed, showing Hand picking and Automated options.

description: User hovers over the "Hand picking" participant selection card.
frame_description: The cursor dwells on the Hand picking option until the end of the segment.

description: User clicks the "Next" button to proceed from the participant selection method screen.
frame_description: The user is on the 'Participant selection' step of the study setup, with 'Hand picking' selected.

description: The application navigates to the participant sourcing page.
frame_description: The screen transitions to the 'Audience' section, specifically the 'Panel' sourcing page.

description: User clicks the "Next" button to confirm using the Askable Panel for participant sourcing.
frame_description: The user is on the sourcing selection page with 'Askable Panel' highlighted.

description: The application navigates to the participant location settings.
frame_description: The screen transitions to the 'Participant location' configuration page.

description: User types "United states" into the location search box.
frame_description: The user is typing into the 'Location' input field below the map.

description: A list of matching locations appears as the user types.
frame_description: An autocomplete dropdown menu appears below the location input field.

description: User selects "United States" from the suggested locations.
frame_description: The user clicks on the 'United States' option in the autocomplete list.

description: User clicks the "Delete" button next to "Australia" to remove it from the target locations.
frame_description: The user removes the pre-existing 'Australia' location from the list.

description: User clicks the "Next" button to move to demographic filters.
frame_description: The user proceeds from the location settings.

description: The application navigates to the demographic filters page.
frame_description: The screen transitions to the 'Demographic filters' page.

description: User clicks the "Exclude people you've already spoken to" dropdown menu.
interaction_target: Exclude people you've already spoken to dropdown
frame_description: The user opens the dropdown to change the exclusion period for participants.

description: User selects the "Don't exclude anyone" option from the dropdown list.
frame_description: The user chooses to not apply any exclusion based on previous interactions.

description: User clicks the "Next" button to proceed to the custom screener setup.
frame_description: The user proceeds from the demographic filters page.

description: The application navigates to the custom screener page.
frame_description: The screen transitions to the 'Create a custom screener' page.

description: User clicks the "Add a custom screening question" button.
interaction_target: Add a custom screening question button
frame_description: The user initiates adding a new question to the screener.

description: A menu appears showing different types of screening questions.
frame_description: A small menu with options like 'Multiple choice' and 'Short answer' appears.

description: User selects "Multiple choice" from the question type menu.
frame_description: The user chooses the 'Multiple choice' question format.

description: The 'Multiple Choice' question modal appears on the screen, overlaying the custom screener setup page.
frame_description: A modal titled 'Multiple Choice' is visible over the 'Create a custom screener' page.

description: The user pauses for several seconds before beginning to type the screener question.
frame_description: The cursor is stationary over the 'Screener question' input field in the modal.

description: The user types the question: 'Which best describes you habits for how you interact with TV streaming services?' into the screener question field.
frame_description: Text is being entered into the 'Screener question' field in the Multiple Choice modal.

description: The user clicks on the first answer field to begin entering options.
frame_description: The cursor clicks into the 'Answer 1...' text field.

description: The user types 'I don't use them at all' as the first multiple-choice answer.
frame_description: The first answer option is being typed into the modal.

description: The user clicks on the second answer field.
frame_description: The cursor clicks into the 'Answer 2...' text field.

description: The user types 'I use them a few times per week' as the second answer option.
frame_description: The second answer option is being typed into the modal.

description: The user clicks on the third answer field.
frame_description: The cursor clicks into the 'Answer 3...' text field.

description: The user clicks on the fourth answer field.
frame_description: The cursor clicks into the 'Answer 4...' text field.

description: The user types 'I use them multiple times per day' as the fourth answer option.
frame_description: The fourth answer option is being typed into the modal.

description: The user clicks the 'Save' button to add the multiple-choice question to the screener.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the 'Save' button at the bottom right of the modal.

description: The Multiple Choice modal closes, and the newly created question appears in the list on the main page.
frame_description: The modal disappears, revealing the 'Custom screener' page with the new question listed.

description: The user clicks the 'Next' button to proceed to the next step of the study setup.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the 'Next' button below the screener question list.

description: The page navigates from 'Custom screener' to the 'Your Timezone' setup page.
frame_description: The screen content changes to show the 'Your Timezone' setup section.

description: The user clicks on the 'Audience' section in the sidebar to return to the screener settings.
frame_description: The cursor clicks 'Audience' in the left-hand navigation menu.

description: The page navigates back to the 'Custom screener' section.
frame_description: The screen content returns to the 'Create a custom screener' page.

description: The user clicks the '+ Add another custom question' button.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the button to add a new question.

description: A dropdown menu appears with options for the type of question to add.
frame_description: A small menu opens below the 'Add another custom question' button.

description: The user selects 'Copy from other study' from the dropdown menu.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the 'Copy from other study' option in the dropdown.

description: A modal titled 'Select a study to copy from' opens with a loading spinner.
frame_description: A new modal appears with a red loading animation in the center.

description: The list of previous studies loads within the modal.
frame_description: The loading spinner disappears, and a list of studies with their status and dates is displayed.

description: The user clicks the 'X' button to close the study selection modal without picking a study.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the close icon at the top right of the modal.

description: The study selection modal closes.
frame_description: The modal disappears, returning focus to the main screener page.

description: The user clicks the '+ Add another custom question' button again.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the add question button once more.

description: The question type dropdown menu reappears.
frame_description: The dropdown menu opens again.

description: User selects 'Short answer' from the custom question type dropdown menu.
frame_description: The user is on the 'Custom screener' page with a dropdown menu open showing question types.

description: A modal overlay titled 'Short answer' appears on the screen.
frame_description: A modal window for creating a short answer screener question is now visible over the main page.

description: The user types the question: 'What is the name of your favourite streaming service?' into the screener question field.
frame_description: Text is being entered into the 'Screener question' field in the Short answer modal.

description: User clicks the 'Save' button to add the short answer question.
frame_description: The user clicks the save button at the bottom right of the modal.

description: The 'Short answer' modal closes and the new question is added to the screener list.
frame_description: The modal disappears, and the main 'Custom screener' page is visible again with the new question listed.

description: User clicks the '+ Add another custom question' button.
frame_description: The user clicks the button to add a second screener question.

description: A dropdown menu appears showing available question types.
frame_description: A small menu opens below the button with options like 'Multiple choice' and 'Short answer'.

description: User selects 'Multiple choice' from the dropdown menu.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Multiple choice' option in the open menu.

description: A modal overlay titled 'Multiple Choice' appears on the screen.
frame_description: A new modal window for creating a multiple choice screener question is displayed.

description: User types the question: 'Which TV streaming service are you using most right now?' into the screener question field.
frame_description: The user is typing the question text into the input field within the 'Multiple Choice' modal.

description: User clicks the first answer field and types 'Netflix'.
frame_description: The user enters the first multiple choice option.

description: User clicks the third answer field and types 'Disney+'.
frame_description: The user enters the third multiple choice option.

description: User clicks the fourth answer field to focus it.
frame_description: The user clicks into the empty fourth answer field.

description: User types 'Prime Video' into the fourth answer field.
frame_description: The user enters the final multiple choice option.

description: User clicks the 'Save' button to add the multiple choice question.
frame_description: The user clicks the save button to finalize the multiple choice question.

description: The 'Multiple Choice' modal closes and the question is added to the screener list.
frame_description: The modal disappears, returning to the main screener list which now shows two questions.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button to proceed to the next step of the study setup.
frame_description: The user clicks the primary 'Next' button at the bottom of the page.

description: The page navigates from 'Custom screener' to the 'Additional Info' section.
frame_description: The screen transitions to the 'Additional Info' page, specifically the 'Your Timezone' section.

description: Horizontal scroll detected during page transition.
User clicks the 'Next' button at the bottom of the 'Custom screener' page.
frame_description: The user is on the custom screener setup page with several multiple-choice and short-answer questions visible.

description: The page navigates to the 'Your Timezone' section under 'Additional Info'.
frame_description: The screen transitions to the timezone selection page.

description: User types a short description of the study participants they are looking for.
interaction_target: Short description of who you're looking for (Required)
frame_description: The user enters 'Do you watch TV on streaming services?' into the text area.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button on the 'Description' page.
frame_description: The user finishes entering the description and proceeds to the next step.

description: The page navigates to the 'Additional instructions' section.
frame_description: The screen transitions to the additional instructions page.

description: Horizontal scroll detected during page transition.
User clicks the 'Next' button on the 'Contacts' page.
frame_description: The user reviews the contact details and proceeds.

description: The page navigates to the 'Legal & privacy' section.
frame_description: The screen transitions to the legal and privacy settings page.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button on the 'Legal & privacy' page.
frame_description: The user accepts the standard terms and proceeds.

description: The page navigates to the 'Session Times' section.
frame_description: The screen transitions to the calendar view for scheduling sessions.

description: User clicks on the calendar to add a session time slot.
frame_description: The user selects the 9:00 AM - 9:45 AM slot on Wednesday, February 25th.

description: A new session time slot appears on the calendar.
frame_description: The selected time slot is now highlighted on the calendar.

description: User clicks on the calendar to add a third session time slot.
frame_description: The user selects the 11:00 AM - 11:45 AM slot on Wednesday, February 25th.

description: A third session time slot appears on the calendar.
frame_description: The 11:00 AM slot is now highlighted.

description: User clicks on the calendar to add another session time slot on Thursday.
frame_description: The user selects the 2:00 PM - 2:45 PM slot on Thursday, February 26th.

description: A second session time slot appears on Thursday.
frame_description: The 2:00 PM slot on Thursday is now highlighted.

description: User clicks on the calendar to add a session time slot on Friday.
frame_description: The user selects the 9:00 AM - 9:45 AM slot on Friday, February 27th.

description: A session time slot appears on Friday.
frame_description: The 9:00 AM slot on Friday is now highlighted.

description: User clicks on the calendar to add a third session time slot on Friday.
frame_description: The user selects the 11:00 AM - 11:45 AM slot on Friday, February 27th.

description: A third session time slot appears on Friday.
frame_description: The 11:00 AM slot on Friday is now highlighted.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button on the 'Session Times' page.
frame_description: The user finishes scheduling sessions and proceeds to the final review.

description: Horizontal scroll detected during page transition.
The page navigates to the 'Review & Submit' section.
frame_description: The screen transitions to the study summary and review page.

description: User clicks the 'Submit study' button.
frame_description: The user finalizes the study creation process.

description: The 'Submit study' button changes to a loading state ('Submitting...').
frame_description: A loading indicator appears as the study is being processed.

description: The page navigates to the participants list for the newly created study.
frame_description: The screen transitions to the study dashboard showing the participants list.
